metaData.SAP Product Name: FAIRPRICE ADULT DIAPER TAPED ULTRA L 10S

product.name: FairPrice Adult Ultra Taped Diapers - L

product.description:
This product has a superb absorbent core which allows dual absorption zone for quick absorption and retention of liquid that keeps skin dry. It has an effective Leakage Protection to ensure optimum leakage security. It has a breathable backsheet
that allows good air-flow through, providing maximum comfort. It provides ease of removal. It has a 360˚ soft elastic waistband
that provides comfortable fit even when on the move. It has a blue elastic lines on back of pants to make it easy for wearer to determine the front and back of pants. It has a wetness indicator that changes colour when wet. Regular changing is recommended to keep wearer comfortable.

metaData.Key Information:
• A superb absorbent core which allows dual absorption zone for quick absorption and retention of liquid that keeps skin dry
• Effective leakage protection to ensure optimum leakage security
• Breathable backsheet that allows good air-flow through, providing maximum comfort
• Provides ease of removal
• 360˚ soft elastic waistband that provides comfortable fit even when on the move
• Blue elastic lines on back of pants to make it easy for wearer to determine the front and back of pants
• Wetness indicator that changes colour when wet
metaData.Preparation:
• How to remove & dispose:
1. Tear off seams on both sides to remove
2. Roll up soiled diaper pants and discard into disposal bag

product.description:
• Disposal Tape
• For wearer's convenient disposal.
• 360° Soft Elastic Waistband
• Provides comfortable fit even when on the move.
• Wetness Indicator
• The prints on diaper fade off when wet. Regular changing is recommended to keep wearer comfortable.
• Superior Breathable Backsheet
• Allows good air-flow through, providing maximum comfort. Dermatologically tested.
• Effective Leakage Protection
• Standing leak guard ensures optimum leakage security.
• Ultra Absorbent Core
• Ultra fast absorption and retention of liquid that keeps skin dry. Contains odour control properties.

• Superior Breathable Backsheet
• Odour Control
metaData.Preparation:

metaData.Storage Information: Store in a cool dry place, away from direct heat and sunlight.
